name: @yoshi-taka/ci-perf-lint
description: Static analysis tool for CI workflow performance

scripts.docs:dev: bun run docs:sync && astro dev --root site
scripts.docs:build: bun run docs:sync && astro build --root site
scripts.test: AGENT=1 bun test --parallel && bun run test:fuzz:fast
scripts.test:fuzz:jazzer: bun build ./src/workflow.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --external yaml && bun x jazzer fuzz/workflow.fuzz.mjs fuzz/corpus/workflow --sync
scripts.test:slow:mutation: bun run test:slow:mutation:rule-engine && bun run test:slow:mutation:workflow && bun run test:slow:mutation:core && bun run test:slow:mutation:repo && bun run test:slow:mutation:renderer
scripts.lint: oxfmt --write src test/*.ts scripts/*.ts && oxlint --type-aware --type-check --fix src test
scripts.build: bun build ./src/cli.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --external yaml --external dockerfile-ast --external oxlint
scripts.unused: bun run knip && bun run fallow:dead-code
scripts.audit:static: bun run knip && bun run fallow
scripts.release:alpha: npm version prerelease --preid=alpha --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public --tag alpha && npm publish --prefix packages/ci-perf-lint --tag alpha
scripts.release:stable: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public && npm publish --prefix packages/ci-perf-lint
